title: anguina ovigera
intro: Anguina ovigera, also known as Anguina, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anguina ovigera include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Anguina ovigera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
